events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail / high risk** — undersized conductor for both load (Table 310.16 ampacity) and run length (voltage drop) is a genuine code violation, not acceptable journeyman judgment; work should stop, conductor size recalculated per NEC 310/Table 310.16 plus voltage-drop guidance, and correct conductors pulled before termination/energization.
